examples: Did I mention that Gretchen is also in the slammer?
She can hit him with the Max: Seven years in the slammer.
He was so jealous that he threw him in the slammer, threw him in jail and confiscated it.
At another utility, in an undisclosed city, Slammer downed the computer network controlling vital equipment.
Of Televerde's out-of-prison alumni, 11% have gone back to the slammer over the last 14 years.
